sub_modules.conv3d_coord_calc: Converts the linear streaming voxel index into depth, row, and column coordinates.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_valid: Computes whether the current stream position has a complete valid 3D convolution window.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac: Performs the combinational multiply-accumulate over the flattened 3D stencil window and flattened kernel.
sub_modules.conv3d_line_buffer_model: Combinational line-buffer abstraction module for decomposition and independent replacement.
sub_modules.conv3d_frame_buffer_model: Combinational frame/depth-buffer abstraction module for decomposition and independent replacement.
